expectations.text: Script uses exact DS4Bolivia raw GitHub URLs (master branch, /sdg/sdg.csv and /satelliteEmbeddings/satelliteEmbeddings2017.csv)
expectations.evidence: Line 60: BASE_URL uses master branch. Lines 75-78: loads /sdg/sdg.csv and /satelliteEmbeddings/satelliteEmbeddings2017.csv exactly.

expectations.text: Uses asdf_id for join key, A00-A63 for features, sdg1 as target variable (not imds)
expectations.evidence: Line 66: TARGET = 'sdg1'. Line 68: FEATURE_COLS = [f'A{i:02d}' for i in range(64)]. Line 81: merges on 'asdf_id'.

expectations.text: Both script and notebook import from config.py and call set_seeds()
expectations.evidence: Script: lines 22-25 correctly import and call set_seeds(). Notebook: lines 49-53 correctly import and call set_seeds(). HOWEVER, the notebook uses TARGET='imds' (line 106) not 'sdg1', showing inconsistency between script and notebook for this eval.

expectations.text: Uses train_test_split with test_size=0.2 and random_state=RANDOM_SEED
expectations.evidence: Script line 151-153: train_test_split(X, y, test_size=0.20, random_state=RANDOM_SEED). Notebook line 181-183: identical.

expectations.text: Implements k-fold cross-validation on training set
expectations.evidence: Script line 168: cross_val_score with cv=5. Notebook line 214: cross_val_score with cv=5.

expectations.text: Uses RandomizedSearchCV or GridSearchCV for hyperparameter tuning
expectations.evidence: Script lines 205-214: RandomizedSearchCV with n_iter=50, cv=5. Notebook lines 258-267: identical.

expectations.text: All plt.savefig() calls target images/ directory (not inline-only)
expectations.evidence: Script saves to IMAGES_DIR for all 7 figures (lines 115, 138, 251, 266, 294, 321, 350). Notebook saves to IMAGES_DIR for all figure cells.

expectations.text: CSV result tables saved to tables/ directory
expectations.evidence: Script lines 369, 375: saves to TABLES_DIR. Notebook lines 457, 462: saves to TABLES_DIR.

expectations.text: Notebook .md uses correct MyST Jupytext frontmatter with formats: ipynb,md:myst
expectations.evidence: Notebook lines 1-13: correct Jupytext frontmatter with formats: ipynb,md:myst and python3 kernelspec.

expectations.text: Notebook figure cells use #| label: fig-* directives
expectations.evidence: Lines 126, 147, 300, 322, 351, 383, 422: all figure cells use #| label: fig-* format with fig-cap.

expectations.text: Includes partial dependence plots using PartialDependenceDisplay
expectations.evidence: Script lines 340-353: PartialDependenceDisplay.from_estimator with top-6 features, 2x3 grid. Notebook lines 428-434: identical.

expectations.text: Script implements local caching of downloaded data to data/rawData/
expectations.evidence: Script lines 61, 70-83: checks CACHE_PATH, loads from disk or downloads and saves to data/rawData/ds4bolivia_merged.csv.

expectations.text: Includes permutation importance (not just MDI/built-in feature importance)
expectations.evidence: Script lines 304-306: permutation_importance with n_repeats=30. Notebook lines 386-388: identical.

expectations.text: Uses sdg1 as target variable throughout (script and notebook), not imds
expectations.evidence: Script correctly uses TARGET='sdg1' (line 66). But the notebook uses TARGET='imds' (line 106). The two agents (eval-1 and eval-2) wrote to the same filesystem paths — eval-1 wrote the notebook with imds, eval-2 overwrote the script with sdg1, but the notebook was not overwritten. This is a test infrastructure issue, not a skill issue.

notes: 12/14 assertions passed. The 2 failures are due to test infrastructure (both worktree agents wrote to same paths, causing script/notebook mismatch). The script correctly uses sdg1. The notebook was written by the eval-1 agent using imds. Both files are individually high quality.
